diagnostics.recommendation: Add at least one floor before running calculations.
Add at least one room before running calculations.
Assign a climate zone or equivalent climate context.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Ground-contact boundaries were found without explicit ground metadata.
diagnostics.recommendation: Provide ground-contact metadata for affected rooms.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Room floor area must be positive.
diagnostics.recommendation: Set room area to a value greater than 0.
Set room height to a value greater than 0.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Room volume must be positive or derivable from area and height.
diagnostics.recommendation: Provide valid area and height inputs.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Room envelope input is missing: no walls or windows found.
diagnostics.recommendation: Add envelope elements or document intentional exclusion.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Window-to-floor area ratio is suspiciously high (> 0.8).
diagnostics.recommendation: Verify glazing and floor area values.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Room ventilation configuration is missing and defaults may be used.
diagnostics.recommendation: Provide explicit ventilation configuration or confirm defaults.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Ventilation airflow inputs must not be negative.
diagnostics.recommendation: Set ACH and infiltration ACH to non-negative values.
Set positive U-values for relevant elements.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Envelope U-value is suspiciously high (> 10 W/(m²·K)).
diagnostics.recommendation: Review U-value data source and units.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Window SHGC must be within the 0..1 range.
Room indoor setpoint is missing and defaults may be used.
diagnostics.recommendation: Provide explicit indoor setpoint or document fallback assumptions.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Calculation preference defaults are in use because explicit preferences were not found.
diagnostics.recommendation: Create project calculation preferences to make assumptions explicit.

diagnostics.messageTemplate: Unit-bearing field requires explicit unit documentation.
diagnostics.recommendation: Use unit-explicit field names and document units in fixtures/contracts.
